description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a low-pitched gable roof and a rectangular footprint, surrounded by a neatly manicured lawn. The front facade features a small porch with steps leading up to the entrance, flanked by two ornamental trees. Large windows line the front, providing ample natural light to the main living area. On one side, there is a driveway leading to a detached garage, while the backyard includes a fenced area with a swimming pool and patio. The exterior walls are finished in a light color, contrasting with the darker roof. The property is bordered by a short hedge and paved walkways, giving it a suburban residential feel.
description: A single-story bungalow with a gable roof, front porch, large windows, detached garage, and a backyard pool, set on a landscaped lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the porch, main entrance, two ornamental trees, and the driveway leading up to the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, the detached garage, and the backyard pool area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the fenced backyard, swimming pool, patio, and the back of the garage.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, side windows, and the continuation of the landscaped yard.
